zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville是William de Baseville和Mrs William de Baseville的兒子，出生。他和Mrs Richard de Baseville至少有1個女兒。他去世於1212年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville是William de Baseville和Mrs William de Baseville的儿子，出生。他和Mrs Richard de Baseville至少有1个女儿。他去世于1212年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville was born as the son of William de Baseville and Mrs William de Baseville. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs Richard de Baseville. He died in 1212.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville est né, fils de William de Baseville et Mrs William de Baseville. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs Richard de Baseville. Il est décédé en 1212.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville wurde, als Sohn von William de Baseville und Mrs William de Baseville geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs Richard de Baseville mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1212.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville è nato il come figlio di William de Baseville e Mrs William de Baseville. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mrs Richard de Baseville. Morì nel 1212.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de BasevilleはWilliam de BasevilleとMrs William de Basevilleの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Richard de Basevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1212年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville(은)는 William de Baseville(와)과 Mrs William de Baseville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Richard de Baseville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville nasceu filho de William de Baseville e Mrs William de Baseville. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mrs Richard de Baseville. Ele faleceu em 1212.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville родился. Его родителей звали William de Baseville и Mrs William de Baseville. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs Richard de Baseville. Он умер в 1212 г.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Baseville nació como hijo de William de Baseville y Mrs William de Baseville. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mrs Richard de Baseville. Murió en 1212.
